name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Los Angeles, CA car title loans at 1601 S La Brea Ave with Montana Capital Car Title Loans—same-day emergency funding available.
description_long:
Montana Capital Car Title Loans is located at 1601 S La Brea Ave in Los Angeles, CA, within the mid-city corridor. This standalone storefront serves the greater Los Angeles area with accessible walk-in service for borrowers seeking vehicle-backed loans. The location's street-level position on La Brea makes it convenient for those driving through or living in the Los Angeles neighborhoods nearby.

At this Los Angeles location, Montana Capital specializes in car title loans that let vehicle owners borrow cash by leveraging their vehicle's title. The 1601 S La Brea Ave branch can be reached at +1 323-244-2454 to discuss loan eligibility, term options, and the documentation needed to complete your application.

If you're a Los Angeles resident with a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle, the S La Brea Ave location offers a direct path to emergency funds. Bring your current vehicle title, a valid photo ID, and proof of residency to streamline processing. Montana Capital provides straightforward title-based lending without complicated fees.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Loan amounts up to $50,000, significantly higher than typical payday loans
No prepayment penalties, allowing borrowers to save on interest by paying early
Approval based on vehicle equity and income rather than credit score, accessible to bad-credit borrowers
Loan terms up to 36 months, providing longer repayment windows than payday alternatives
24/7 availability and online application process for convenience
Licensed and regulated by California DFPI with transparency-focused leadership
Keeps vehicle keys with borrower despite using title as collateral
cons: APRs up to 175% represent extremely high borrowing costs compared to traditional lending
Origination fees up to 10% of loan amount add significant upfront costs
Vehicle title held as collateral creates risk of vehicle loss if unable to repay
Subject to state-specific lending caps that may vary availability and terms
Website displayed 404 error for specific location, suggesting potential operational issues
best_for: Borrowers with bad credit needing emergency funds larger than typical payday loans ($2,000+)
Vehicle owners facing immediate cash shortages with no other financing options available
Consumers who can repay within 12-36 months and want to avoid payday loan debt cycles
Individuals specifically seeking title-based loans where vehicle equity determines eligibility
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best for borrowers with damaged credit who own vehicles and face genuine emergencies requiring $2,000+ in cash quickly. The critical caveat: APRs up to 175% and origination fees make this an extremely expensive borrowing option that should only be considered when no alternatives exist and repayment within 12-36 months is certain.
services: Multiple loan term options (up to 36 months)
Title loan FAQs and educational resources
Loans for borrowers with bad credit history
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1601 S La Brea Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90019
